regime_narrative: Range-bound consolidation. BTC holding $66,300-$69,400 on declining volume for four days. No catalyst in sight — the market is waiting.

assets.narrative: Holding the range. $67,800 with volume drying up. Nothing to do here until range resolves.
ETH is the one to watch. Funding creeping up (+0.067%) while price drifts toward $1,880 where there's a $22M long liquidation cluster. If that level breaks, forced selling accelerates the move.
Relative strength continues — up 4.8% in 24h while everything else chops. Approaching $144 resistance, held for a week. Clean break on volume would be notable.
Drifting within yesterday's range on low volume. No setup.

setups.narrative: Funding creep + liquidation cluster at $1,880. If that level breaks, forced selling accelerates to $1,820. Invalid above $1,950.
Relative strength for a week. Clean hourly close above $144 with volume targets $152. Invalid below $138.

market_narrative: Day 4 of consolidation. ETH is tightening toward a liquidation cluster while SOL shows relative strength. Rest of the market is unremarkable — alts drifting in lockstep, nothing to differentiate. Two setups worth watching today.
